Gramma: Review of Present and Past Tenses
Review of Future Forms

D1.writing: Talk about living and nonliving things and write about them

D2.writing: Talk and write about favorite kinds of art and the shapes used in it.

D3.writing: Complex Sentences Using Before and After, Write about a trip

D4.gramma: Present Perfect with For and Since
D4.writing: Complex Sentences with Until, Write about someone who visits a biome

D5.gramma: A, An, The, and No Article
D5.writing: Run-On Sentences, Write about interesting buildings you've seen

D6.gramma: Review of Present and Past Tenses
D6.writing: Reporting Verbs, Write a story of your own

D1.writing: Punctuation and Sentence Structure Review, Talk about taking care of living things and write about what you should do

D2.writing: Using Commas in Lists, Talk and write about art tools used in art projects

D3.gramma: Want to / Need to / Have to
D3.writing: Complex Sentences Using Although, Write about what explorers do

D4.writing: Complex Sentences with Since and Because, Write about protecting biomes

D5.gramma: Review of Tenses and Future Forms
D5.writing: Order of Adjectives, Write about a building, sculpture, or object from another country

D6.writing: Using Numerals, Write about what you think stories will be like in the future
